log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kender — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kender — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kender — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Kender — Bardic Musician HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Kender — Bardic Musician HP: 29/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Kender — Bardic Musician HP: 5/67
--- Kender — Bardic Musician --- HP: 5/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kender — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kender — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kender — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Kender — Bardic Musician HP: -13/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!

--- Kender — Bardic Musician --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 14

→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
